title: doellingeria glabrata
intro: Doellingeria glabrata, also known as hairy false goldenrod, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family, native to North America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Doellingeria glabrata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, and have been used to treat a range of ailments.
